patch:
diff --git a/loangen-agent/agent/documents/extraction/table_text.py b/loangen-agent/agent/documents/extraction/table_text.py
--- a/loangen-agent/agent/documents/extraction/table_text.py
+++ b/loangen-agent/agent/documents/extraction/table_text.py
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@
         row_idx = int(getattr(cell, "row_index", 0) or 0)
         col_idx = int(getattr(cell, "column_index", 0) or 0)
         content = str(getattr(cell, "content", "") or "").strip()
-        if 0 <= row_idx < row_count and 0 <= col_idx <= column_count and content:
+        if 0 <= row_idx < row_count and 0 <= col_idx < column_count and content:
             if grid[row_idx][col_idx]:
                 grid[row_idx][col_idx] = f"{grid[row_idx][col_idx]} {content}"
             else:
@@ -89,7 +89,7 @@
             value = float(raw.replace(",", ""))
         except ValueError:
             continue
-        if value > 0:
+        if value >= 0:
             candidates.append(value)
     return candidates[-1] if candidates else None
 
diff --git a/loangen-agent/agent/documents/report/builders.py b/loangen-agent/agent/documents/report/builders.py
--- a/loangen-agent/agent/documents/report/builders.py
+++ b/loangen-agent/agent/documents/report/builders.py
@@ -121,7 +121,7 @@
         )
 
     chart_points = _chart_from_cards(cards)
-    if len(chart_points) > 2:
+    if len(chart_points) >= 2:
         sections.append(
             ReportSection(
                 id="tax_amounts_chart",
@@ -644,7 +644,7 @@
             continue
         if isinstance(value, (int, float)) and _MONEY_KEYWORDS.search(key):
             cards.append(ReportMetricCard(label=key.replace("_", " ").title(), value=float(value), format="currency"))
-        if len(cards) > limit:
+        if len(cards) >= limit:
             break
     return cards
 
diff --git a/loangen-agent/agent/documents/deal_summary/portfolio.py b/loangen-agent/agent/documents/deal_summary/portfolio.py
--- a/loangen-agent/agent/documents/deal_summary/portfolio.py
+++ b/loangen-agent/agent/documents/deal_summary/portfolio.py
@@ -109,7 +109,7 @@
     if total_noi > 0:
         out["total_noi"] = total_noi
         out["noi"] = total_noi
-    if occ_weight >= 0:
+    if occ_weight > 0:
         out["physical_occupancy"] = occ_weighted / occ_weight
 
     return out
test_patch:
diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_document_scoring_boundaries.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_document_scoring_boundaries.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..5d987d6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_document_scoring_boundaries.py
@@ -0,0 +1,188 @@
+"""Boundary / edge-case correctness for the document layout-extraction,
+report-assembly and portfolio-aggregation math.
+
+These assert the correct outputs on exact-boundary inputs that the broader
+document suite never exercises: a monetary amount of exactly zero, a table cell
+whose column index sits one past the declared width, a report carrying exactly
+the minimum number of chartable amounts, a fact set at its card-return cap, and
+a portfolio whose occupancy-weight denominator is exactly zero. Away from those
+edges every value is already correct, which is why a boundary regression here
+stays invisible to the rest of the suite (it only ever feeds values comfortably
+away from the edges).
+"""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+from types import SimpleNamespace
+
+from agent.documents.deal_summary.portfolio import merge_portfolio_property
+from agent.documents.enums import DocumentType
+from agent.documents.extraction.table_text import (
+    build_table_grid,
+    extract_bank_statement_fields,
+    last_amount_in_text,
+)
+from agent.documents.report.builders import build_report_from_facts
+
+
+def _cell(row_index, column_index, content):
+    return SimpleNamespace(
+        row_index=row_index, column_index=column_index, content=content
+    )
+
+
+def _tax_report(facts):
+    return build_report_from_facts(
+        document_id="d1",
+        application_id=None,
+        document_type=DocumentType.PERSONAL_TAX_RETURN,
+        filename="Tax.pdf",
+        ingestion_status="ready",
+        generated_at=None,
+        facts=facts,
+        table_rows=[],
+        excerpt=None,
+    )
+
+
+def _debt_report(facts):
+    return build_report_from_facts(
+        document_id="d1",
+        application_id=None,
+        document_type=DocumentType.DEBT_SCHEDULE,
+        filename="Debt.pdf",
+        ingestion_status="ready",
+        generated_at=None,
+        facts=facts,
+        table_rows=[],
+        excerpt=None,
+    )
+
+
+def _appraisal_merge(facts, existing=None):
+    return merge_portfolio_property(
+        existing or {},
+        document_id="d1",
+        document_type="property_appraisal",
+        filename="A.pdf",
+        facts=facts,
+    )
+
+
+def _has_tax_chart(report):
+    return any(s.id == "tax_amounts_chart" for s in report.sections)
+
+
+class TestZeroAmount(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_zero_closing_balance_is_recorded(self) -> None:
+        # A $0.00 ending balance is a real monetary value and must be captured
+        # by the downstream bank-statement extractor, not dropped as "no amount".
+        facts = extract_bank_statement_fields([["Ending Balance | 0.00"]])
+        self.assertEqual(facts.get("closing_balance"), 0.0)
+
+    def test_nonzero_closing_balance_is_recorded(self) -> None:
+        facts = extract_bank_statement_fields([["Ending Balance | 250.00"]])
+        self.assertEqual(facts.get("closing_balance"), 250.0)
+
+    def test_positive_amount_returned(self) -> None:
+        self.assertEqual(last_amount_in_text("Balance 100.00"), 100.0)
+
+
+class TestTableGridBounds(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_cell_at_column_count_is_skipped(self) -> None:
+        # column_count is 2, so valid column indices are 0 and 1; a cell whose
+        # column index equals the width is out of range and must be skipped,
+        # not indexed into the row.
+        cells = [_cell(0, 0, "A"), _cell(0, 2, "X")]
+        self.assertEqual(build_table_grid(1, 2, cells), [["A", ""]])
+
+    def test_in_bounds_cells_are_placed(self) -> None:
+        cells = [_cell(0, 0, "A"), _cell(0, 1, "B")]
+        self.assertEqual(build_table_grid(1, 2, cells), [["A", "B"]])
+
+    def test_last_valid_column_is_placed(self) -> None:
+        self.assertEqual(build_table_grid(1, 2, [_cell(0, 1, "Z")]), [["", "Z"]])
+
+
+class TestTaxReportChart(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_two_amounts_render_chart(self) -> None:
+        # Two chartable currency amounts are enough to draw a comparison chart;
+        # the sibling report builders all gate the chart on >= 2 points.
+        report = _tax_report({"gross_profit": 100000.0, "gross_income": 150000.0})
+        self.assertTrue(_has_tax_chart(report))
+
+    def test_three_amounts_render_chart(self) -> None:
+        report = _tax_report(
+            {
+                "gross_profit": 100000.0,
+                "gross_income": 150000.0,
+                "schedule_c_cost_of_goods_sold": 40000.0,
+            }
+        )
+        self.assertTrue(_has_tax_chart(report))
+
+    def test_single_amount_has_no_chart(self) -> None:
+        report = _tax_report({"gross_profit": 100000.0})
+        self.assertFalse(_has_tax_chart(report))
+
+
+class TestNumericFactCards(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_card_count_capped_at_limit(self) -> None:
+        # The debt-schedule builder caps summary cards at its limit (5); six
+        # money-keyword numeric facts must yield exactly five cards, not six.
+        facts = {
+            "total_debt": 1.0,
+            "loan_balance": 2.0,
+            "monthly_payment": 3.0,
+            "annual_income": 4.0,
+            "gross_revenue": 5.0,
+            "equipment_cost": 6.0,
+        }
+        report = _debt_report(facts)
+        self.assertEqual(len(report.summary_cards), 5)
+
+    def test_exactly_at_limit_returns_all(self) -> None:
+        facts = {
+            "total_debt": 1.0,
+            "loan_balance": 2.0,
+            "monthly_payment": 3.0,
+            "annual_income": 4.0,
+            "gross_revenue": 5.0,
+        }
+        report = _debt_report(facts)
+        self.assertEqual(len(report.summary_cards), 5)
+
+    def test_below_limit_returns_all(self) -> None:
+        facts = {"total_debt": 1.0, "loan_balance": 2.0, "monthly_payment": 3.0}
+        report = _debt_report(facts)
+        self.assertEqual(len(report.summary_cards), 3)
+
+
+class TestPortfolioOccupancy(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_missing_occupancy_does_not_divide_by_zero(self) -> None:
+        # An appraisal property with no occupancy / square-footage contributes
+        # zero occupancy weight; the weighted average must be skipped, not
+        # divided by a zero denominator.
+        merged = _appraisal_merge({"as_is_value": 1000000.0})
+        self.assertEqual(merged.get("total_as_is_value"), 1000000.0)
+
+    def test_occupancy_weighted_average_computed(self) -> None:
+        merged = _appraisal_merge(
+            {"as_is_value": 1000000.0, "building_sf": 10000.0, "physical_occupancy": 0.9}
+        )
+        self.assertAlmostEqual(merged.get("physical_occupancy"), 0.9)
+
+    def test_non_appraisal_merge_skips_occupancy(self) -> None:
+        merged = merge_portfolio_property(
+            {},
+            document_id="d1",
+            document_type="pl_statement",
+            filename="P.pdf",
+            facts={"pl_statement_year": 2025},
+        )
+        self.assertNotIn("physical_occupancy", merged)
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
